name: Webpage Content Extractor & Analyzer
description: Scrapes a webpage via Firecrawl, uses Claude AI to extract structured content and key information, and saves the results to Google Sheets with a summary posted to Slack. Adapted from n8n's static HTML page serving workflow.

source.originalName: Serve a static HTML page when a link is accessed

firecrawlKey.description: Firecrawl connection key for web scraping

sheetsKey.description: Google Sheets connection key for saving extracted content

slackKey.description: Slack connection key for posting summary

url.description: URL of the webpage to extract content from

spreadsheetId.description: Google Sheets spreadsheet ID for storing extracted data

extractionFocus.default: Extract all key information, headings, data points, and contact details
extractionFocus.description: What to focus on extracting from the page

steps.name: Build Claude prompt for content extraction
Build Sheets rows from extracted data
Save extracted content to Google Sheets
